subject: [PATCH v2 3/7] mm: list_lru: move list dead check to lock_list_lru_of_memcg()

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Reviewed the patch and noted that it addresses his unspoken suggestion to add a comment regarding reparenting. He gave a Reviewed-by tag.

2026-03-12.patch_summary: This patch moves the check for list dead condition from lock_list_lru() to its caller, specifically in the MEMCG variant of lock_list_lru(). This is done to prepare for unifying the lock_list_lru() variants. The change involves moving a conditional statement and updating the return value of the function.
